expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families, not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies 'Inter' and 'JetBrains Mono' — both specific named font families

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies Inter (primary) and JetBrains Mono (code/CLI) — exactly 2 font families

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8
expectations.evidence: DDD spacing table includes 120px (5xl) which is not a multiple of 8 (120/8=15). Also uses 12px gap for CTA buttons, 10px gap for feature list items, and 13px font sizes. Features grid uses 16px gap. The 120px spacing value breaks the 8px grid.

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses forge insert frame, forge style, forge insert text, forge insert stack, forge set-layout, forge move, forge screenshot throughout all phases

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot after sections
expectations.evidence: Only one screenshot at the very end in Phase 8 ('forge screenshot --name devforge-landing-full'). No per-section screenshots after Phases 2-7.

expectations.text: Build plan covers all 5 requested sections: hero, features grid, social proof, pricing, footer
expectations.evidence: Build plan includes: Phase 3 Hero Section, Phase 5 Features Grid (3 cards), Phase 4 Social Proof Section, Phase 6 Pricing Table (3 tiers), Phase 7 Footer. All 5 requested sections present.
